overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The character explores a police scene and continues through streets with overgrown vegetation, passing pedestrians and approaching a biohazard containment area with police cordon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk lined with palm trees approaching police checkpoint

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a police scene in the distance

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
industrial water tower with number 06 visible on the side
two-story green municipal building with red roof
white police patrol car parked outside the green building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees in a dystopian cyberpunk city. The environment features overgrown vegetation, futuristic skyscrapers in the distance, and a prominent water tower. The character approaches a green building with a police car parked outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: police checkpoint outside green municipal building

events.description: arrives at police scene with officers and patrol car outside green building
camera circles around the police car to show officers and building facade from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: examining the police scene and officers near the green building, circling the area

notable_agents.action: police officer standing guard next to the patrol car
officer examining the area near the building entrance

entered.detail: police officer in tactical gear standing by the patrol car
second officer investigating near the building corner

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a police checkpoint outside a green two-story building. Two police officers stand near a white patrol car, and the camera pans around to examine the scene. The area shows signs of urban decay with overgrown grass and abandoned structures nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with overgrown vegetation and pedestrian traffic

events.description: leaves police scene and continues down the street past overgrown areas
navigates through oncoming pedestrian traffic on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and overgrown urban scenery

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink cap and orange shirt walking past the camera
pedestrian in brown leather jacket and blue pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk edge
massive white geometric lattice structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street past a green dumpster and wooden shack. Various pedestrians walk along the path, including individuals in distinctive clothing. The background features a massive white lattice structure and futuristic skyscrapers with large holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: police cordon with biohazard containment truck

events.description: approaches biohazard truck and police cordon with yellow tape
passes armed officers standing guard at the biohazard cordon

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a biohazard containment area with armed police presence

notable_agents.action: armed police officer standing guard near the biohazard truck
police officer monitoring the containment zone near patrol car

entered.detail: large military truck with yellow biohazard symbol on the side
white police car parked across the street blocking access
yellow caution tape strung across the street marking the cordon

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a police cordon marked with yellow tape, featuring a large biohazard truck and additional police vehicles. Armed officers stand guard near the containment area as the character walks past, with the massive lattice structure visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying cyberpunk district that shifts from a quiet, overgrown street into a high-security biohazard containment zone. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers, moving toward a green building where a police car is stationed. As the camera pans around a police checkpoint to examine the urban decay and abandoned structures, the path opens up into a busier street filled with pedestrians, green dumpsters, and a wooden shack. The scene then expands to reveal a massive white lattice structure and holographic billboards in the distance before turning toward a police cordon marked with yellow tape. Finally, the camera glides past armed officers and a large biohazard truck, leaving the open street behind for the restricted containment area.
